name: Documents
copyPolicy: Use English labels as working copy/placeholders unless Arabic copy is provided. Preserve space for Arabic translation.

canonicalReference.editPolicy: Treat as canonical reference. Create a duplicate or new mockup frame unless the user explicitly asks to edit this component.

sidebar.note: Same shared SUI sidebar component as all other S-System apps.

topBar.title: Documents
topBar.note: Only 'Draft' confirmed as default active tab. Full tab list to be documented from Figma.

observedSections: Metadata tabs (Comments, Keywords, Tasks, Attachments, Entities, Reply, Document)

documentList.purpose: Scrollable list of documents with metadata.
documentList.note: Row component key to be confirmed from Figma.

drawingRules: Read this JSON and app/apps/document.md before drawing Documents features.
Use app/screens/document/canonical-layout.md as the layout blueprint — do not fetch Figma just for frame structure.
Use published SUI components from the local component index by componentKey.
Keep RTL alignment and preserve Arabic expansion space.
Keep 8px island gaps. Use background/surface_2 for list/preview islands.
Create a duplicate or new mockup frame rather than modifying the canonical reference.
openQuestions: Full top bar tab list (only Draft confirmed as default).
Whether Documents has an AppFilters panel like Task Management.
Empty, loading, error, and no-results states.
